[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11110111 7
1 00010010 2
2 01111101 6
3 10010111 5
4 10110101 5
5 11110001 5
6 11111110 7
7 11111111 a

01 10 00110100 3
12 21 11010001 4
23 32 11011110 6

56 65 01101111 6
67 76 11101010 5
70 07 00010010 2 match 1

13 31 00001111 4

35 53 10101100 4

61 16 11001100 4
72 27 11110111 7 match 0

37 73 00101001 3
